payload.text: SW registration failed:  SecurityError: Failed to register a ServiceWorker for scope ('https://once-upon-iota.vercel.app/') with script ('https://once-upon-iota.vercel.app/sw.js'): The script has an unsupported MIME type ('text/html').

To fix the Service Worker registration error (`unsupported MIME type ('text/html')`), we need to move the `sw.js` and `manifest.json` files to the `public/` directory.

In a Vite project, files in the root directory (like `src`) are processed as source code, while files in `public/` are served as static assets at the root of the deployed site. Currently, `sw.js` is not being served as a static file, so your router (or Vercel) is returning the `index.html` content for that path, causing the MIME type mismatch.

Here are the changes to create these files in the correct `public/` location.
